title: site v1 online
text: First working build of the node graph deployed. Nodes still drift a little too fast on mobile — tune damping next.

title: satellite pass
text: Caught a clean ISS pass at dusk. Logging TLE data for a future overlay experiment.

title: new specimen
text: Picked up a small piece of labradorite. Cataloguing it under rocks once I get decent light for photos.

title: fractal render batch
text: Ran an overnight batch of Julia set renders at higher iteration depth. A few worth keeping in the gallery.

title: test framework rewrite
text: Migrating the QA suite to a leaner assertion layer. Fewer flaky tests already.
